sourceTitle: Responsible Use of Generative AI - UC Berkeley 2025
evidenceSnippetOriginal: UC has several AI principles: Appropriateness; Transparency; Accuracy, Reliability and Safety; Fairness and Non-Discrimination; Privacy and Security; Human Values; Shared Benefit and Prosperity; and Accountability.
evidenceLocator: OL Play 2 section, referencing UC Berkeley's AI policy context
